articles.title: Stock Market Crash News Today: Nifty Ends Below 23,800, Sensex Slides 300 Points; Bajaj Finance, Eternal Top Losers
articles.excerpt: Eleven out of 15 sectoral gauges compiled by the NSE traded lower, led by the NSE Nifty Auto Index's 1.2% lower. On the flipside, the NSE Nifty IT Index was the top sectoral gainer, up 0.6%.
articles.summary: Fourteen out of 15 sectoral gauges tracked by NSE traded lower, led by NSE Nifty Auto Index's 0.7% fall. On the flipside, the NSE Nifty IT Index was the only sectoral gainer, up 0.9%.

articles.title: Hindustan Zinc Q1 results 2026: Net profit of PSU stock more than doubles to  ₹5,469 crore, revenue surges 72%
articles.excerpt: Hindustan Zinc, a Vedanta subsidiary, reported a Q1 2026 net profit of ₹5,469 crore, up 145% from ₹2,234 crore last year. Revenue from operations rose 72% to ₹13,033 crore, compared to ₹7,591 crore in the previous year.
articles.summary: Hindustan Zinc, a Vedanta subsidiary, reported a Q1 2026 net profit of ₹5,469 crore, up 145% from ₹2,234 crore last year. Revenue from operations rose 72% to ₹13,033 crore, compared to ₹7,591 crore in the previous year.
